title: Massachusetts Seed-to-Sale Tracking (Metrc)
summary: Massachusetts requires all licensees to track cannabis from cultivation to sale using the Metrc system, ensuring full chain-of-custody and inventory reconciliation.

title: Massachusetts Adult-Use and Medical Regulations
summary: Massachusetts regulates cannabis under 935 CMR 500 (adult-use) and 501 (medical), updated in 2026.

title: New York PLMA Packaging and Labeling Rules
summary: New York updated packaging, labeling, marketing, and advertising rules effective December 2025 with compliance deadlines in 2026.

title: New York Metrc Tracking Requirements
summary: New York requires all inventory to be tracked in Metrc, including UID tagging and test-passed requirements before retail transfer.

title: New Jersey Cannabis Regulatory Commission
summary: The NJ-CRC regulates both medical and adult-use cannabis markets, sets rules, and enforces compliance requirements.

title: New Jersey 2026 Hemp-Derived Product Rules
summary: New 2026 law defines intoxicating hemp products and enforces THC thresholds, requiring compliance with testing and labeling rules.

title: Maine Cannabis Open Data
summary: Maine provides public data including retail sales, compliance data, and licensee information for its adult-use program.

title: Maine Testing Requirements
summary: Maine requires testing for contaminants including solvents, metals, microbes, and pesticides before sale.

title: Pennsylvania Medical Marijuana Program
summary: Pennsylvania regulates medical cannabis through a structured program with seed-to-sale tracking and patient registry systems.
